Table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT

Card of table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT

Name

RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT

Code

RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT

'---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data

T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENTS

 

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

 

SELECT distinct

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE AS PRODUCT_CODE_BK,

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE AS COUNTRY_CODE_BK,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_ARTICLEAPPROVEDSTATUSCODE AS ARTICLE_APPROVED_STATUS_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_EXTERNALBULLETS AS EXTERNAL_BULLET,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_EXTERNALKEYPRODUCTFEATURES AS EXTERNAL_KEY_PRODUCT_FEATURE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_EXTERNALPRODUCTDESCRIPTION AS EXTERNAL_PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_EXTERNALTITLE AS EXTERNAL_TITLE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_GROUPID AS GROUP_CODE_BK,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_OFFLINEDATE AS OFFLINE_DATETIME,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_ONLINEDATE AS ONLINE_DATETIME,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_PREORDERDATEUNTIL AS PRE_ORDER_END_DATETIME,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_PRODUCTVERSIONS_ACTIVE AS PRODUCT_VERSION_ACTIVE_FLAG,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_PRODUCTVERSIONS_EAN AS PRODUCT_VERSION_EAN,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_PRODUCTVERSIONS_PMIPRODUCTCODE AS PRODUCT_VERSION_PMI_PRODUCT_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_PRODUCTVERSIONS_RANKING AS PRODUCT_VERSION_RANKING,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_PRODUCTVERSIONS_SPLITRATE AS PRODUCT_VERSION_SPLIT_RATE,

__LOAD_TS AS VALID_FROM

FROM DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENTS

 

 

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_GROUPID

Primary key(s) Target: COUNTRY_CODE_BK, PRODUCT_CODE_BK, GROUP_CODE_BK

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- PII data - The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level. --

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

N/A

 

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD2

 

----------

RLS

----------

based on COUNTRY_CODE_BK (events_country_code)

 

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

Target schema: PL_CONSUMERORDER


Check constraint name of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT

CKT_RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG


Server validation rule of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT

%RULES%


Code preview of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT

drop table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT
--==============================================================
create or replace table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT (
PRODUCT_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
GROUP_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
COUNTRY_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
PRODUCT_VERSION_PMI_PRODUCT_CODE TEXT,
PRODUCT_VERSION_EAN TEXT,
ARTICLE_APPROVED_STATUS_CODE TEXT,
EXTERNAL_BULLET TEXT,
EXTERNAL_KEY_PRODUCT_FEATURE TEXT,
EXTERNAL_PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
EXTERNAL_TITLE TEXT,
ASSIGNMENT_OFFLINE_DATETIME DATETIME,
ASSIGNMENT_ONLINE_DATETIME DATETIME,
ASSIGNMNET_PRE_ORDER_END_DATETIME DATETIME,
PRODUCT_VERSION_ACTIVE_FLAG FLAG,
PRODUCT_VERSION_RANKING INTEGER,
PRODUCT_VERSION_SPLIT_RATE INTEGER,
VALID_FROM DATETIME not null,
VALID_TO DATETIME not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG FLAG not null,
constraint PK_RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_ primary key (COUNTRY_CODE_BK, PRODUCT_CODE_BK, GROUP_CODE_BK)
not enforced
);

alter table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT set comment = 'Reference data entity capturing the assignment of a product''s market availability, including online/offline periods, approval status, external bulletins, rankings, and market-specific eligibility flags.';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT.PRODUCT_CODE_BK is
'Code of the product (events_products_code )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT.GROUP_CODE_BK is
'Group ID (events_products_availabilityAssignments_groupId )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT.COUNTRY_CODE_BK is
'Country where the product is available (events_country_code )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT.PRODUCT_VERSION_PMI_PRODUCT_CODE is
'Product Versions Product Versions (events_products_availabilityAssignments_productVersions_pmiProductCode )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT.PRODUCT_VERSION_EAN is
'Product Versions EAN (events_products_availabilityAssignments_productVersions_ean )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT.ARTICLE_APPROVED_STATUS_CODE is
'Article Approved Status Code (events_products_availabilityAssignments_articleApprovedStatusCode )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT.EXTERNAL_BULLET is
'External Bullets (events_products_availabilityAssignments_externalBullets )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT.EXTERNAL_KEY_PRODUCT_FEATURE is
'External Key Product Features (events_products_availabilityAssignments_externalKeyProductFeatures )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT.EXTERNAL_PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION is
'External Product Description (events_products_availabilityAssignments_externalProductDescription )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT.EXTERNAL_TITLE is
'External Title (events_products_availabilityAssignments_externalTitle )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT.ASSIGNMENT_OFFLINE_DATETIME is
'Offline Date (events_products_availabilityAssignments_offlineDate )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT.ASSIGNMENT_ONLINE_DATETIME is
'Online Date (events_products_availabilityAssignments_onlineDate )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT.ASSIGNMNET_PRE_ORDER_END_DATETIME is
'Pre-order End Date (events_products_availabilityAssignments_preOrderDateUntil )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT.PRODUCT_VERSION_ACTIVE_FLAG is
'Product Versions Active (events_products_availabilityAssignments_productVersions_active )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT.PRODUCT_VERSION_RANKING is
'Product Versions Ranking (events_products_availabilityAssignments_productVersions_ranking )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT.PRODUCT_VERSION_SPLIT_RATE is
'Product Versions Split Rate (events_products_availabilityAssignments_productVersions_splitRate )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is active (VALID_FROM: Indicates the dattime when the validity of the record starts. As it is SCD Type 2 it''s derived from the __LOAD_TS. )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT.VALID_TO is
'It indicates till when the record is Active (VALID_TO: Indicates the dattime till when the record is/was valid. As it is SCD Type 2 it''s derived from the __LOAD_TS. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31)';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT.ACTIVE_FLAG is
' It indicates if the record is active (ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.)';

Column VALID_FROM of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT

Card of the column VALID_FROM of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT

Name

VALID_FROM

Code

VALID_FROM

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_FROM of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT

VALID_FROM: Indicates the dattime when the validity of the record starts. As it is SCD Type 2 it's derived from the __LOAD_TS.


Check constraint name of the column VALID_FROM of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT

Column VALID_TO of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT

Card of the column VALID_TO of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT

VALID_TO: Indicates the dattime till when the record is/was valid. As it is SCD Type 2 it's derived from the __LOAD_TS. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31


Check constraint name of the column VALID_TO of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT

Name

ACTIVE_FLAG

Code

ACTIVE_FLAG

Data Type

BOOLEAN

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT

ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.
